paper_title: Measurement of Airway Responsiveness and Specific Immunotherapy in a Murine Model of Grass Pollen-Induced Airway Inflammation

methods.description: This method measures airway responsiveness in anesthetized, orotracheally intubated, spontaneously breathing animals by assessing airway resistance after provocation with methacholine aerosol. It is used to evaluate airway hyperresponsiveness (AHR) in a murine model.

steps.description: Twenty 4 h after the last challenge, airway responsiveness was measured in anesthetized orotrachealy intubated, spontaneously breathing animals by measurement of airway resistance after provocation with methacholine aerosol (6, 12, 25 and 50 mg/ml) as described previously.
steps.searchable_summary: measure airway resistance in mice after methacholine aerosol provocation

steps.description: Airway reactivity is expressed as an increase of airway resistance compared to baseline level.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate increase in airway resistance from baseline

methods.method_name: Effect of Treatment on Cytokine Production
methods.description: This method evaluates the effect of specific immunotherapy on cytokine production by restimulated splenocytes in a murine model of grass pollen-induced airway inflammation.

steps.description: Effect of treatment on cytokine production of in vitro restimulated splenocytes (10^7 cells). Phl p5b was used in a final concentration of 100 µg/ml.
steps.searchable_summary: restimulate splenocytes with Phl p5b and measure cytokine production

steps.description: The increasing number of treatment of mice by immunotherapy results in decreasing IL-5 production by restimulated splenocytes.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze IL-5 production decrease with increased immunotherapy treatments
outputs: correlation between treatment and IL-5 production

steps.description: Naïve mice were untreated. n = 4-13 per group, *p < 0.05, **p < 0.01, ***p < 0.001 compared to PBS-treated control group, determined by unpaired Mann-Whitney test.
steps.searchable_summary: validate treatment effects using Mann-Whitney test
